title: harnieria kempeana
intro: Harnieria kempeana is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of India and Sri Lanka, belonging to the family Cucurbitaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Harnieria kempeana include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant include extracts, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and topical applications for various health issues.
